response.justification: Strong technical foundation and demonstrable leadership experience with open-source passion, but significant gaps in required qualifications. German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic' when the role explicitly requires C1 minimum for client-facing advisory work in Berlin. Additionally, lacks clear evidence of formal IT architecture expertise, UML proficiency, or architecture consulting background—core requirements for a Head of Development role. While the candidate could potentially grow into the position, these gaps present substantial barriers to immediate effectiveness.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, desktop, embedded) with proven senior/staff-level technical depth
Genuine open-source commitment demonstrated through founding GISCollective platform and active contributions to D language ecosystem
Clear leadership and mentoring track record including staff roles, workshop creation, code kata sessions, and knowledge-sharing initiatives
concerns: German language proficiency listed as 'Basic' but role requires C1 (professional working level) for client advisory work in German-speaking context
No demonstrated expertise in formal architecture methodologies (UML, TOGAF, etc.) or explicit IT architecture consulting experience—core to the Head of Development role
Recent career gap (caregiving since October 2025) and resume shows development leadership but limited evidence of formal project management methodology or IT consulting background
